name: Lower-Fat Hummus, Spicy Bean Soup with Corn, Black Bean Sal
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cooked garbanzo beans, rinsed and drained
2 tablespoons lemon juice, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, puree the cooked garbanzo beans, tahini, water, minced garlic, and lemon juice until smooth.
2. Adjust seasonings with salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper to taste.
3. Refrigerate the mixture overnight to allow flavors to develop.
4. Stir the mixture before serving.
5. This hummus makes about 2 cups and pairs well as a dip for baby carrots or other vegetables.
